name: Wash ZB7
comment:
ZB7 features a wide zoom, ranging from 3.8° to 54° that makes this little luminaire extremely versatile. At the narrow angle, the beam produced is very solid and concentrated, superb for aerial effects. At full aperture, the ZB7 becomes an excellent wash light and it can replace much heavier and bulkier equipment.
The ZB7 LED may be controlled separately , making it ideal for graphic lighting effects too. More than fifty pre-installed effects/color macros, 2000K-10000K color temperature control, a 24 bit dimmer with five curves, an electronic strobe @ 25 f/sec, and Ethernet access complete this highly professional tool.

capabilities.effectName: Color Wheel rotation between the color level 12 to 250
Color Wheel rotation between the color level 12 to 250
